query: UPDATE business_positions SET salaryAmount = 55000 WHERE title LIKE '%Specialist%' OR title LIKE '%Writer%' OR title LIKE '%Creator%' OR title LIKE '%Assistant%' OR title LIKE '%Instructor%' OR title LIKE '%Administrator%';
